command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== NATS CONNECTIVITY DIAGNOSIS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.203 '
echo "iptables INPUT rules:"
iptables -L INPUT --line-numbers -n 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "iptables not available"
echo "nftables rules:"
nft list ruleset 2>/dev/null | grep -E "4222|8222|nats" | head -10 || echo "nftables: no relevant rules"
echo "NATS container network mode:"
docker inspect moreno-nats --format "{{.HostConfig.NetworkMode}}" 2>/dev/null
echo "NATS listen IPs:"
docker exec moreno-nats nats-server --help 2>/dev/null | grep listen | head -3 || echo "no --help"
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "4222|8222" | head -5
' 2>&1

echo '=== NATS REACH FROM vm-memory (telnet test) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
timeout 3 bash -c "echo > /dev/tcp/192.168.0.203/4222" 2>/dev/null && echo "PORT 4222: OPEN" || echo "PORT 4222: BLOCKED"
timeout 3 bash -c "echo > /dev/tcp/192.168.0.203/8222" 2>/dev/null && echo "PORT 8222: OPEN" || echo "PORT 8222: BLOCKED"
' 2>&1

echo '=== GMAIL WORKFLOW EXPORT (rollback baseline) ==='
python3 -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect('/home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('SELECT id, name, nodes, connections, settings FROM workflow_entity WHERE id="ftZLisyAbKmZI1RH"')
row = cur.fetchone()
if row:
    export = {'id':row[0],'name':row[1],'nodes':json.loads(row[2]),'connections':json.loads(row[3]),'settings':json.loads(row[4]) if row[4] else {}}
    with open('/tmp/gmail-workflow-rollback.json','w') as f:
        json.dump(export, f, indent=2)
    print('Exported to /tmp/gmail-workflow-rollback.json, nodes:', len(export['nodes']))
conn.close()
"

echo DONE_2001
